We sent itFootnote-1down on the Night of Determination.
But what can make youFootnote-2realize what the Night of Determination is?
The Night of Determination is better than a thousand months—
in it descend the angels, with the SpiritFootnote-3among them, by the leave of their Lord with every command.
Peace! It is until the riseFootnote-4 of dawn.
